subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest towards the Most Effulgent Horizon! Today, all who dwell upon the earth are in pursuit of mirages, running after vanishing shadows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بافق ابهی الیوم جمیع من علی الارض از پی سراب دوانند و از عقب ظل زائل
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @idle fancies; lust and passion
